ab: huminicuwa’ su’ musa’ i tatak?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: miniray kuwing cu kulu’ musa’ i tatak.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: huminicuwa’ hiya’ musa’ i papkitalan cu kinmuxaal?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: huminakay hiya’ musa’ i papkitalan cu kinmawxa’.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: huminicuwa’ su’ musa’ i Pnghu’?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: guminlu kuwing na kulu’ ka manbahaag musa’ i Pnghu’.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: huminicuwa’ su’ musa’ i Pnghu’?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: guminlu kuwing na parnah musa’ i Pnghu’.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: guminlu su’ na nanuwan cu muwah i imuwag?
en: How do you go home?

ab: guminlu kuwing na cieyun cu muwah i imu.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: guminlu na nanuwan i Pukaw cu musa’ i papatiqan?
en: How does Pukaw  go to school?

ab: guminlu na kulu’ na hapuy i Pukaw cu musa’ i papatasan.
en: Pukaw goes to school by train.

ab: gumilu na nanuwan i Kaynu’ cu musa’ i kiyukay?
en: How does Kaynu go to church?

ab: guminlu na tamayray i Kaynu’ cu musa’ i kiyukay.
en: Kaynu’ goes to church by bicycle.

ab: gumlu su’ na cieyun musa’ i mateq qu?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: iqaat, gumlu kuwing na bas’ musa’ i matas.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: gumlu su’ na tamayray musa’ i mateq qu?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: uwal, gumlu kuwing na tamayray musa’ i matas.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: gumlu su’ na kawte’ musa’ i Kawsyung qu?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: uwal, gumlu kuwing na kawte’ musa’ i Kawsyung.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: gumlu su’ na kulu’ na hapuneq quga kulu’ ka manbahaag musa’ i Taytung?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: gumlu kuwing na kulu’ na manbahaag, ini’ kanga’ tayhuk nku gumlu cu kulu’ na manbahaag ku gumlu cu kulu’ na hapuy.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: gumlu su’ na bas’ quga miray cu kulu’ musa’ i kiyukay?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: miray kuwing na kulu’ musa’ i kiyukay, masiuhiuhi nku gumlu na bas’ ku miray nanak cu kulu’.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: makasasawbeh imuwag mamu ku babinasan cu aninanuwan qu?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: ini’ pakasasawbeh, gumlu kuwing na utubay musa’ i babinasan cu aninanuwan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: makasasawbeh i papatiqan ku yucyu’ qu?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: sawbeh, tehkan i humakay.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: makasasawbeh i autuan cu kulu’ ku naniqan qu?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: matgi lata’ na autuan cu kulu’ ru’ humakay cu mamagalpu cu qayaw ga tayhuk la.
ch: B:出車站再走幾十步路就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
